scripts.install-manual: cd fase-manual/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.install-ia: cd fase-ia/backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev-manual: concurrently "cd fase-manual/backend && npm start" "cd fase-manual/frontend && npm start"
scripts.dev-ia: concurrently "cd fase-ia/backend && npm start" "cd fase-ia/frontend && npm start"
